mapper.select:
SELECT M.MATERIAL_ID AS materialId, M.MATERIAL_NAME AS materialName, M.SUPPLY_PRICE AS supplyPrice, M.MATERIAL_TYPE AS materialType,
NVL(I.CURRENT_QUANTITY,0) AS currentQuantity, NVL(I.SAFETY_QUANTITY,0) AS safetyQuantity,
(M.SUPPLY_PRICE * NVL(I.CURRENT_QUANTITY,0)) AS buyPrice,
M.STATUS AS status
FROM MATERIALS M
LEFT JOIN STORE_INVENTORIES I ON M.MATERIAL_ID = I.MATERIAL_ID AND I.STORE_ID = #{storeId}
ORDER BY (NVL(I.SAFETY_QUANTITY,0) - NVL(I.CURRENT_QUANTITY,0)) DESC, CASE M.MATERIAL_TYPE WHEN 'AF' THEN 1 WHEN 'RF' THEN 2 WHEN 'FF' THEN 3 WHEN 'PK' THEN 4 WHEN 'KW' THEN 5 WHEN 'ET' THEN 6 ELSE 99 END, M.MATERIAL_NAME

SELECT PO.PURCHASE_ORDER_ID AS purchaseOrderId, PO.STORE_ID AS storeId, S.STORE_NAME AS storeName FROM PURCHASE_ORDERS po JOIN STORES s ON PO.STORE_ID = S.STORE_ID WHERE PO.PURCHASE_ORDER_ID = #{purchaseOrderId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO PURCHASE_ORDER_ITEMS ( PURCHASE_ORDER_ITEM_ID, REQUEST_QUANTITY, APPROVED_QUANTITY, MATERIAL_NAME_SNAPSHOT, SUPPLY_PRICE_SNAPSHOT, MATERIAL_ID, PURCHASE_ORDER_ID ) VALUES ( SEQ_PUR_REQ_ITEM.NEXTVAL, #{requestQuantity}, 0, #{materialNameSnapshot}, #{supplyPriceSnapshot}, #{materialId}, #{purchaseOrderId} )
mapper.select:
SELECT P.PURCHASE_ORDER_ID,
'P' || EXTRACT(YEAR FROM P.CREATED_AT) || LPAD(P.PURCHASE_ORDER_ID,4,'0') AS PURCHASE_CODE,
P.STORE_ID, S.STORE_NAME,
U.USER_NAME, CASE U.ROLE WHEN 'ADMIN' THEN '관리자' WHEN 'OWNER' THEN '점주' END AS ROLE,
P.CREATED_AT,
NVL(P.ORDER_MEMO,'-') AS ORDER_MEMO,
P.STATUS,
M.MATERIAL_ID,
M.MATERIAL_TYPE || EXTRACT(YEAR FROM M.CREATED_AT) || LPAD(M.MATERIAL_ID,4,'0') AS MATERIAL_CODE,
M.MATERIAL_NAME,
M.MATERIAL_TYPE,
I.SUPPLY_PRICE_SNAPSHOT,
INV.CURRENT_QUANTITY,
I.REQUEST_QUANTITY,
NVL(I.APPROVED_QUANTITY,0) AS APPROVED_QUANTITY,
( I.REQUEST_QUANTITY * I.SUPPLY_PRICE_SNAPSHOT ) AS TOTAL_PRICE,
I.REJECT_REASON
FROM PURCHASE_ORDERS P
JOIN PURCHASE_ORDER_ITEMS I ON P.PURCHASE_ORDER_ID = I.PURCHASE_ORDER_ID
JOIN MATERIALS M ON I.MATERIAL_ID = M.MATERIAL_ID
JOIN STORE_INVENTORIES INV ON INV.MATERIAL_ID = M.MATERIAL_ID AND INV.STORE_ID = P.STORE_ID
JOIN STORES S ON S.STORE_ID = P.STORE_ID
JOIN USERS U ON U.USER_NO = S.OWNER_USER_NO
WHERE P.PURCHASE_ORDER_ID = #{purchaseOrderId}
SELECT PURCHASE_ORDER_ID, STATUS, TOTAL_AMOUNT, ORDER_MEMO, STORE_ID, CREATED_AT FROM PURCHASE_ORDERS WHERE PURCHASE_ORDER_ID = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE PURCHASE_ORDERS P SET TOTAL_AMOUNT = ( SELECT NVL(SUM(REQUEST_QUANTITY * SUPPLY_PRICE_SNAPSHOT),0) FROM PURCHASE_ORDER_ITEMS WHERE PURCHASE_ORDER_ID = P.PURCHASE_ORDER_ID ) WHERE PURCHASE_ORDER_ID = #{id}

UPDATE PURCHASE_ORDERS SET STATUS =
'REQUESTED'
'CANCELED'
WHERE PURCHASE_ORDER_ID = #{purchaseOrderId}
mapper.select: SELECT T.* FROM ( SELECT PURCHASE_ORDER_ID , 'P' || EXTRACT(YEAR FROM PO.CREATED_AT) || LPAD(PURCHASE_ORDER_ID, 4, '0') AS PURCHASE_CODE , ITEMS.TOTAL_AMOUNT , PO.STATUS , PO.CREATED_AT , STORE_NAME , STORE_ID FROM PURCHASE_ORDERS PO JOIN ( SELECT SUM(SUPPLY_PRICE_SNAPSHOT * REQUEST_QUANTITY) AS TOTAL_AMOUNT , PURCHASE_ORDER_ID FROM PURCHASE_ORDER_ITEMS GROUP BY PURCHASE_ORDER_ID ) ITEMS USING ( PURCHASE_ORDER_ID ) JOIN STORES S USING ( STORE_ID ) ORDER BY PO.CREATED_AT DESC , PURCHASE_ORDER_ID DESC ) T WHERE ROWNUM <= #{count}

SELECT COUNT(CASE WHEN STATUS = 'REQUESTED' THEN 1 END) AS REQUESTED_COUNT , COUNT(CASE WHEN STATUS = 'APPROVED' THEN 1 END) AS APPROVED_COUNT , COUNT(CASE WHEN STATUS = 'REJECTED' THEN 1 END) AS REJECTED_COUNT FROM PURCHASE_ORDERS
